demographics.living_situation: lives in own home; adult child staying overnight after today's episode

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I walked out to the letterbox and suddenly felt dizzy, my chest felt tight, and I thought I was going to black out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It frightened me — I nearly fainted just walking to the letterbox and my chest went tight. My son is worried and wanted someone to check on me.

symptom_narrative.onset: the dizzy, near-fainting spell came on suddenly today while walking outside to the letterbox
symptom_narrative.duration: the dizzy spell and chest tightness passed after about 10 minutes of sitting and resting
symptom_narrative.character: a light-headed, about-to-black-out feeling, with a tight squeezing feeling in the chest at the same time
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: bad enough that I had to stop and sit down and I really thought I'd pass out
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the dizziness in my head and the tightness across the middle of my chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it only comes on when I exert myself — walking, doing things — and settles when I stop and rest
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting down and resting completely made it ease off
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: walking and any exertion brings it on
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've been getting more and more short of breath over the last few months when I walk, more than I used to
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no full faint before, but I've noticed I get puffed and a bit light-headed on exertion more than I used to over the past three months
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've started staying still and not moving around much because I'm scared of fainting

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I don't think I've had any heart problems diagnosed before, but I've slowed down a lot

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: nothing regular for my heart or blood pressure that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives at home and was independent until this; my son is staying over tonight because of the near-faint

objective_data_offered.value: adult child reports the patient went very pale and unsteady by the letterbox and nearly went down, and is now sitting resting in a chair looking tired but settled
frail-looking, sitting comfortably in a chair, breathing quietly with no obvious distress while at rest
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance at rest only; does not reflect what happens on exertion

objective_data_offered.value: says he could not have kept walking during the episode and had to sit immediately
